options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: enemy_rando
options.description: Determines if enemies are randomized.

options.name: starting_room_rando
options.description: Determines if the starting spawn is randomized.

options.name: increase_pot_ryo
options.description: Determines if pots have an increased amount of ryo.

options.name: pot_rando
options.description: Determines if pot locations are randomized.

options.name: randomize_health
options.description: Determines if Health Items are added into the pool.

options.name: randomize_ryo
options.description: Determines if Ryo Items are added into the pool.

options.name: prevent_oneway_softlocks
options.description: Entrances that are normally one-way are now two-way.

options.name: chugoku_door_unlocked
options.description: Determines if the Chugoku door starts unlocked.

options.name: pre_unlocked_warps
options.description: Pre-unlock all flute warp destinations. You still need to get the flute and Yae to warp.

options.name: music_rando
options.description:
Determines if and how music tracks are randomized.

- Off: No music randomization
- On: Full music randomization
- On with Area Music: Music randomization with area-specific handling

options.name: major_hint_count
options.description: Number of hints for progression items in the player's world.

options.name: location_hint_count
options.description: Number of hints for tedious locations in the player's world.

options.name: fast_text
options.description: Make text appear instantly instead of being typed out character by character.

options.name: keep_intro_cutscene
options.description: Keep the intro cutscene at the start of the game.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.
